_help: Per-whale payday reminders. Each entry: who the whale is, which model they're on, what day they get paid, and how to handle them. The bot pings #chatter-pins-qa-pins on payday morning so the on-shift chatter+QA know how to handle each whale that day.

_fields.fanId: OnlyFans fan numeric id (the bot uses this to match incoming messages/buys)
_fields.name: display name (shown in the ping; e.g. 'Dominic')
_fields.model: creator account username (matches one of the connected accounts)
_fields.payday: Mon | Tue | Wed | Thu | Fri | Sat | Sun  — day the whale gets paid
_fields.note: optional free-text shown in the ping
